title_zh: GeForce NOW推出搭载GeForce RTX 5080的多伦多服务器
title_en: GeForce NOW Turns Up the Heat With New GeForce RTX 5080-Powered Toronto Server
summary_zh: 本周的GFN周四活动带来了更多游戏、更强性能和更多游玩方式。云游戏服务GeForce NOW在多伦多新增了一台搭载GeForce RTX 5080的服务器，使该地区用户能享受到更高性能的云端体验。《Neverness to Everness》游戏也在云端获得了更新。
summary_en: This GFN Thursday event introduces more games, increased power, and new ways to play on GeForce NOW. The cloud gaming service expands with a new GeForce RTX 5080-powered server in Toronto, delivering dedicated high performance closer to members in the region. The game 'Neverness to Everness' also receives a cloud update.
why_it_matters_zh: 新增搭载RTX 5080的服务器显著提升了多伦多及周边地区用户的云游戏体验，缩短延迟，提升性能，是GeForce NOW扩展区域和服务质量的重要举措。
why_it_matters_en: The addition of the RTX 5080-powered server significantly enhances the cloud gaming experience for users in Toronto and nearby regions by reducing latency and boosting performance, marking a key step in GeForce NOW's regional expansion and service improvement.

title_en: Running Low-Latency Analytical Workloads with GPU-Accelerated Presto on NVIDIA GB200 NVL72
summary_zh: Presto是一款开源分布式SQL引擎，能够对海量数据进行快速交互式查询。在NVIDIA GPU上，Presto可实现极致性能表现。
summary_en: Presto is an open source, distributed SQL engine designed for fast, interactive queries on very large datasets. Utilizing NVIDIA GPUs, Presto achieves peak performance.
why_it_matters_zh: 借助NVIDIA GB200 NVL72的GPU加速，Presto能够显著提升查询速度和降低延迟，满足大规模数据分析的实时需求。
why_it_matters_en: With GPU acceleration on the NVIDIA GB200 NVL72, Presto significantly improves query speed and reduces latency, enabling real-time analytics on large-scale datasets.

title_zh: NVIDIA Nemotron 实现基准领先性能，结合 LangChain 深度智能体技术
title_en: NVIDIA Nemotron Achieves Benchmark-Leading Performance With LangChain Deep Agents Harness
summary_zh: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra 以较低成本提供领先性能，超越顶级封闭模型，结合最广泛采用的 AI 智能体编排平台。LangChain 针对 NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra 调优其深度智能体工具，实现开源模型中最高准确率，同时完成更多任务，吞吐量更高，运行速度提升十倍。
summary_en: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra offers leading performance at a lower cost than top closed models, integrating with the largest and most widely adopted AI agent orchestration platform. LangChain tuned its Deep Agents harness for Nemotron 3 Ultra, achieving the highest accuracy among open models, completing more tasks at higher throughput, and running at 10x speed.
why_it_matters_zh: 该合作展示了开源 AI 系统在性能和效率上的巨大进步，为开发者和企业带来经济高效且功能强大的解决方案。
why_it_matters_en: This collaboration demonstrates significant advancements in performance and efficiency for open AI systems, providing developers and enterprises with cost-effective and powerful solutions.

title_zh: 为NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra创建LangChain深度代理配置以提升性能
title_en: Create a LangChain Deep Agents Harness Profile for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra to Improve Performance
summary_zh: 智能代理系统通常在准确性和成本之间存在权衡。性能最优的专有前沿模型和工具虽然提供了顶级准确性，但成本较高。
summary_en: Agentic systems often face a trade-off between accuracy and cost. The highest-performing proprietary frontier models and harnesses provide top accuracy but are costly.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过为NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra创建专门的LangChain深度代理配置，可以优化模型性能，提高系统整体效率，降低运营成本。
why_it_matters_en: By creating a dedicated LangChain deep agents harness profile for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, model performance can be optimized, enhancing overall system efficiency and reducing operational costs.

title_zh: 像素精准可解释的胁迫指标：用于田间作物病情严重度量化的语义分割框架
title_en: Pixel-Precise Explainable Stress Indexing: A Semantic Segmentation Framework for Disease Severity Quantification in Field Crops
summary_zh: 植物病害由生物和非生物胁迫引起，全球农业产量每年损失估计20-40%，经济损失超过2200亿美元。本文提出了一个统一的深度学习流程，结合语义分割、基于回归的严重度估计和疾病分类。胁迫严重度分为四级（低到极高），基于感染叶面积比例。使用苹果树叶子病害分割数据集（1641样本，6类）评估四种模型：U-Net（MobileNetV2）、SegFormer、FCN及PSPNet。MobileNetV2的U-Net表现最佳，达98.20%像素精度、0.70 mIoU及99.41%检测准确率，且单图处理14.7毫秒，适合实时应用。SegFormer表现接近（mIoU 0.66），FCN及PSPNet空间精度较低（约0.49 mIoU）。严重度指数与专家标注高度相关（r=0.968，R^2=0.937），证明系统在自动作物监测和决策支持中的可靠性。
summary_en: Plant diseases caused by biotic and abiotic stresses lead to an estimated 20-40% global agricultural yield loss annually, exceeding USD 220 billion in economic damage. This paper proposes a unified deep learning pipeline combining semantic segmentation, regression-based severity estimation, and disease classification. Stress severity is categorized into four levels based on the proportion of infected leaf area. Experiments on the Apple Tree Leaf Disease Segmentation dataset (1,641 samples, six classes) test four models: U-Net (MobileNetV2), SegFormer, FCN, and PSPNet. U-Net with MobileNetV2 achieves the best results with 98.20% pixel accuracy, 0.70 mIoU, and 99.41% detection accuracy at 14.7 ms per image, suitable for real-time use. SegFormer performs competitively (mIoU 0.66), while FCN and PSPNet have lower spatial accuracy (~0.49 mIoU). The calculated severity index strongly correlates with expert annotations (r=0.968, R²=0.937), showing the system's reliability for automated crop monitoring and decision support.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过高精度且实时的深度学习模型实现了对作物病情的像素级量化，可有效辅助精准农业决策，降低人工评估主观性和工作强度，具有较高的实用价值和推广潜力。
why_it_matters_en: This study achieves pixel-level quantification of crop disease severity using a high-accuracy and real-time deep learning model, effectively supporting precision agriculture decisions by reducing manual assessment subjectivity and workload, demonstrating strong practical value and potential for deployment.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Pixel-Precise Explainable Stress Indexing: A Semantic Segmentation Framework for Disease Severity Quantification in Field Crops. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 63.

title_zh: 文化遗产纺织品的人工智能：针对新颖乌洛斯图案合成的精细调优潜伏扩散模型
title_en: AI for Cultural Heritage Textiles: Fine-Tuned Latent Diffusion for Novel Ulos Motif Synthesis
summary_zh: 为保护和振兴印度尼西亚北苏门答腊巴塔克族的文化遗产传统纺织品乌洛斯，本研究提出利用人工智能框架，针对高分辨率乌洛斯图案数据集精细调优两种潜伏扩散模型，以生成既符合文化又具创新性的图案。通过多项指标和传统织工评估，Protogen v3.4模表现优于Stable Diffusion v1.4，在视觉保真度和图案多样性方面取得显著提升，展现了生成模型在传承与创新间的平衡潜力。
summary_en: This study introduces a generative AI framework that fine-tunes two latent diffusion models on high-resolution Ulos textile motifs to produce culturally consistent yet novel designs. Evaluations show Protogen v3.4 outperforms Stable Diffusion v1.4 in fidelity and diversity, balancing tradition and innovation to aid preservation and creative renewal of Indonesian Batak Ulos heritage textiles.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究利用生成式AI技术突破传统乌洛斯纺织品图案单一和设计耗时的限制，实现文化传承和设计创新的双重目标，展示了AI在非物质文化遗产保护中的实用价值和应用前景。
why_it_matters_en: By addressing motif diversity and time-consuming design challenges through fine-tuned generative AI, the study demonstrates practical AI applications that preserve intangible cultural heritage while fostering creative innovation in traditional textile design.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: AI for Cultural Heritage Textiles: Fine-Tuned Latent Diffusion for Novel Ulos Motif Synthesis. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 68.

title_zh: AgentLens：面向代码代理评估的生产级轨迹审查
title_en: AgentLens: Production-Assessed Trajectory Reviews for Coding Agent Evaluation
summary_zh: 我们介绍了AgentLens，这是一种用于交互式代码代理的生产级基准测试。现有大多数代码代理基准只关注任务是否通过的单一结果，而AgentLens评估的是整个执行轨迹，包括代理如何执行指令、使用工具、自我验证、纠错及与用户的互动。它结合了形式化验证和由大语言模型撰写的轨迹评论及对比，生成易读的评分解释。AgentLens不仅可用于模型排名，还可用于行为诊断、版本比较及产品回归检测。该基准以开源形式发布。
summary_en: AgentLens is a production-grade benchmark for interactive code agents that assesses the full execution trajectory, not just pass/fail results. It evaluates how agents follow instructions, use tools, self-verify, recover from errors, and interact with users. By combining formal verification with LLM-generated trajectory reviews and comparisons, it produces readable explanations for scores. AgentLens supports model ranking, behavior diagnosis, version comparisons, and regression detection, and is publicly released as open source.
why_it_matters_zh: AgentLens通过关注代码代理的完整执行过程而非仅单一结果，更贴近真实用户体验，帮助开发者全面理解模型表现和改进空间，适合产品开发与研究。
why_it_matters_en: By evaluating the full agent trajectory rather than a single pass/fail metric, AgentLens better reflects real user experience and aids developers in comprehensively understanding model behavior and improvement areas, making it valuable for both product development and research.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: AgentLens: Production-Assessed Trajectory Reviews for Coding Agent Evaluation. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 82.

title_zh: 评估结合SageMath的LLM代理在计算与实验数学中的应用
title_en: Evaluating SageMath-Augmented LLM Agents for Computational and Experimental Mathematics
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种结合大型语言模型（LLM）推理与SageMath可验证反馈的ReAct风格代理框架，并利用Context7获取最新文档。该方法在模拟计算数学研究循环的RealMath基准测试中评估，显著提升了模型解决研究级数学问题的能力。作者改进了RealMath基准，加入了多步后处理和多阶段验证，提升了问题集质量。实验显示，接入SageMath使所有模型平均性能提升9.7百分点，加强了开源和闭源模型间的差距缩小，Qwen 3.7-Max获益最大，而GPT-5.5在启用工具配置下达到了75.2%的最高解题率与最低令牌消耗。研究表明，结合计算机代数系统的智能体是辅助数学计算探索的有前景方向，本工作推动自动猜想发现的发展。项目代码已公开。
summary_en: This paper proposes a ReAct-style agentic framework that integrates large language model (LLM) reasoning with verifiable feedback from SageMath and uses Context7 for up-to-date documentation. It is evaluated on the RealMath benchmark simulating a computational mathematics research loop, significantly improving model performance on research-level math problems. The RealMath benchmark is refined through multi-step post-processing and multi-stage validation to enhance problem set quality. Experiments show that SageMath access boosts all models by an average of 9.7 percentage points, narrowing the gap between open and closed models. Qwen 3.7-Max benefits the most, while GPT-5.5 achieves the highest solve rate of 75.2% and lowest token usage among tool-enabled configurations. The findings suggest CAS-augmented agents as a promising direction for computational mathematics exploration and a step toward automated conjecture discovery. The project repository is publicly available.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究首次系统评估了结合计算机代数系统SageMath与LLM的代理在复杂数学问题求解中的效果，验证了此类工具能显著提升模型性能，推动了自动化数学研究和猜想发现的新方向。
why_it_matters_en: This research systematically evaluates integrating the Computer Algebra System SageMath with LLM agents for solving complex math problems, demonstrating significant performance improvements and advancing automated mathematical research and conjecture discovery.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Evaluating SageMath-Augmented LLM Agents for Computational and Experimental Mathematics. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 多教师策略下的行为杠杆不平衡与多教师在线策略蒸馏
title_en: Behavior Leverage Imbalance in Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation
summary_zh: 本文针对智能语言模型在调用工具、利用工具响应和直接回答之间的学习问题，提出多教师在线策略蒸馏作为训练策略。一位教师专门指导工具调用，另一位教师指导直接回答，学生模型在自身生成的数据分布上学习。研究发现这种方法可能导致行为偏差，尤其是过度调用工具的问题，传统指标难以发现这一点。作者分析了局部标记级信号对整体生成行为的杠杆作用，并提出Soft Clamp方法，通过动态调节标记级别的散度来缓解过度调用，在APIGen-MT数据集上显著减少过度调用同时保持决策准确率。该方法对多教师在线策略蒸馏提出了新的监督视角，强调监控信号的位置而非仅看总量。
summary_en: This paper addresses how agentic language models learn to choose between calling tools, consuming tool responses, and answering directly. It proposes multi-teacher on-policy distillation where one teacher specializes in tool calls and another in direct responses while the student learns from its own generated distribution. The study reveals that this strategy may induce behavior shifts like over-calling tools that are not evident from aggregate metrics. The authors analyze behavior leverage imbalance where local token-level signals exert disproportionate control over global generation modes. They introduce Soft Clamp, a token-level divergence calibration method that dynamically compresses extreme divergence while preserving gradients. Experiments on APIGen-MT show Soft Clamp reduces over-calling from 13.7% to 9.0% versus vanilla GKD without accuracy loss. This suggests multi-teacher on-policy distillation should monitor where teacher signals act, not just their magnitude.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究发现多教师在线策略蒸馏中存在行为杠杆不平衡的问题，导致模型过度调用工具，传统评估指标难以捕捉这一细节。通过提出Soft Clamp方法，能够有效抑制不合理的工具调用行为，提高训练策略的精细度和模型性能，对多教师训练和语言模型行为控制有重要启发意义。
why_it_matters_en: The study identifies a behavior leverage imbalance in multi-teacher on-policy distillation that causes models to over-call tools, which aggregate metrics fail to detect. By proposing Soft Clamp, the approach effectively mitigates unreasonable tool calls, enhancing the fidelity and performance of the training strategy. This offers valuable insights for multi-teacher training and controlling agentic language model behaviors.

title_zh: 应用背景下RAG指标的评估：一次实验、其发现及局限性
title_en: Evaluating RAG Metrics in Applied Contexts: An Experiment, Its Findings and Its Limitations
summary_zh: 本文报告了一项针对多种RAG指标相关性的实证研究。实验基于人类注释员从商业数据创建的问答数据集。使用四个库（Ragas、DeepEval、RAGChecker、Opik）中的评估指标对RAG系统生成的回答和检索片段进行评分，并与两位评估者的评分及召回等标准指标进行了比较和相关性分析。最后，文章指出了方法学的局限，与文献中的方法进行了对比，并提出未来研究方向。此文为原发表于法语工作坊EvalLLM（Brabant, 2026）的论文英文译本。
summary_en: This paper reports an empirical study evaluating the relevance of several RAG metrics. The experiment is based on a question-answering dataset created by human annotators from business data. The generated responses and retrieved spans of a RAG system are scored using evaluation metrics from four libraries (Ragas, DeepEval, RAGChecker, Opik). These metrics are compared to scores given by two evaluators, as well as to standard metrics such as recall. An analysis of correlations is conducted. Finally, the paper highlights certain limitations of the methodology, compares it to those used in literature, and suggests avenues for future research. This English version translates a paper originally published in the French-speaking workshop EvalLLM (Brabant, 2026).
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究对实际应用中的RAG指标进行了实证验证，揭示了这些指标与人工评估及传统指标的相关性与差异，有助于推动问答系统评价方法的改进与标准化。
why_it_matters_en: This study empirically validates RAG metrics in applied settings, revealing their correlation and discrepancies with human evaluation and traditional metrics, contributing to improved and standardized evaluation methods for QA systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Evaluating RAG Metrics in Applied Contexts: An Experiment, Its Findings and Its Limitations. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 上下文搜索何时有效？基于采样复杂度的反思驱动推理理论
title_en: When Does In-Context Search Help? A Sampling-Complexity Theory of Reflection-Driven Reasoning
summary_zh: 本文提出了一个将上下文搜索建模为对推理轨迹的近似推理的理论框架，其中基础模型定义先验，自我反思提供后验更新反馈。研究了推理时间内的采样复杂度，即达到高成功概率所需的序贯尝试次数。结果表明，当反思能可靠地定位早期错误时，上下文搜索能实现指数级性能提升，用多项式数目的尝试解决零次尝试概率指数小的问题；反之，条件化过去尝试不会带来渐近优势。该提升是稳健且可学习的，基于交叉熵训练的近似后验更新可用多项式样本复杂度恢复所需行为。此外，分阶段的强化学习理论中最优策略执行相同的后验重加权规则。实验验证了以上理论预测。
summary_en: This work presents a theoretical framework modeling in-context search as approximate inference over reasoning traces, where the base model sets a prior and self-reflection provides feedback for posterior updates. It studies the inference-time sampling complexity—the number of sequential attempts needed to achieve high success probability. Results show that reliable localization of early mistakes by reflection yields exponential improvements: problems with exponentially small zero-shot success can be solved using only a polynomial number of attempts; if this fails, conditioning on past attempts offers no asymptotic advantage over parallel sampling. These gains are robust and learnable, as cross-entropy training on search rollouts recovers the necessary behavior with polynomial sample complexity. Moreover, under stagewise reinforcement learning abstraction, the optimal policy performs the same posterior reweighting. Key qualitative predictions are validated on real large reasoning models.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究从理论角度揭示了上下文搜索在推理任务中的优势机制及其采样复杂度，为理解和设计效率更高的推理模型提供重要指导。它证明了反思驱动的后验更新不仅能带来指数级性能提升，还具备可学习性和鲁棒性，促进了人工智能领域推理能力的进一步发展。
why_it_matters_en: This study theoretically reveals the mechanisms and sampling complexity advantages of in-context search in reasoning tasks, offering crucial insights for building more efficient reasoning models. It shows that reflection-driven posterior updates can yield exponential performance improvements while being learnable and robust, advancing the development of reasoning capabilities in AI systems.
